instructions.instruction: **Use `Cachex.fetch/3` for get-or-set** — never check-then-set (race condition risk)
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `Cachex.fetch/3` for get-or-set** — never check-then-set (race condition risk)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger cachex-caching.

instructions.instruction: **Use cache warmers for startup** — pre-populate expensive data when application starts
instructions.original_snippets: **Use cache warmers for startup** — pre-populate expensive data when application starts
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger cachex-caching.

instructions.instruction: **Verify hit rate** — call `Cachex.stats/1` and confirm `hit_rate` is non-zero; see **Monitoring Cache Stats** for interpretation thresholds and remediation guidance
